metadata.title: Build an srx_ace_v3_agent for healthcare_admin using operator_lens, processing unsafe_compliance_claim chaos input, but blocked due to unsafe certainty.

mission.primary_objective: Build an srx_ace_v3_agent for healthcare_admin using operator_lens, processing unsafe_compliance_claim chaos input, but blocked due to unsafe certainty.
mission.success_definition: Blocked state receipt generated; no unsafe claim processed; repair receipt recorded for future remediation.

in_scope.item: Healthcare administration compliance claim processing; blocked at intake due to missing context and ambiguous criteria.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Blocked state receipt generated; no unsafe claim processed; repair receipt recorded for future remediation.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

execution_laws.item: Must not process unsafe compliance claims without full validation; must block and record repair receipt; must comply with healthcare regulatory standards.

implementation_contract.item: Healthcare administration compliance claim processing; blocked at intake due to missing context and ambiguous criteria.

verification_contract.item: Blocked state receipt generated; no unsafe claim processed; repair receipt recorded for future remediation.

receipt_contract.item: Return blocked state receipt with reason, no compiled agent output.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: Unsafe compliance claim detected: raw_intent contains 'unsafe_compliance_claim' as chaos input type with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Cannot proceed without validated compliance context, complete constraints, and unambiguous success criteria. Blocking to prevent potential regulatory or legal exposure in healthcare_admin domain.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
